text:
Viola (Leqi) He
Viola He is a Clinical Assistant Professor of Interactive Media Arts (IMA) at NYU Shanghai. Their work explores algorithmic approaches to audio-visual media, as well as designing, researching, and developing alternative structures, systems and interfaces. They are an artist, musician, culture worker, and an organizing member of artist collective Livecode.NYC. They have exhibited and performed at SXSW, Gray Area, Wave Farm, HASTAC Conference, Anomaly Shanghai and more. Previously, He was an Adjunct faculty teaching at School of Visual Arts, teaching MFA Interactive Design.
Education
MPS, Interactive Telecommunications ProgramNew York University
BA, CommunicationUniversity of Southern California
Research Interests
Critical hardware & software
Embodied systems for live performances
